scripts.build: npm run build -w @swarm-cli/core && npm run build -w swarm-cli && npm run build -w @swarm-cli/ui && npm run bundle:ui -w swarm-cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @swarm-cli/core && npm run typecheck -w swarm-cli && npm run typecheck -w @swarm-cli/ui
scripts.ui: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/bin.js ui
scripts.ui:no-open: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/bin.js ui --no-open
